:HL["/_next/static/chunks/0scozk64__87i.css","style"]
:HL["/_next/static/media/70bc3e132a0a741e-s.p.1409xf.ylxg8g.woff2","font",{"crossOrigin":"","type":"font/woff2"}]

8:T411,{
"name": "remember",
"description": "Store information in the agent's long-term memory. Use for facts, preferences, decisions, and observations that should persist across sessions.",
"parameters": {
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["content"],
  "properties": {
    "content": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "The information to store. Be specific and self-contained."
    },
    "tags": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": { "type": "string" },
      "description": "Categorical labels for filtering. Use descriptive tags like 'user-preference', 'api-decision', 'bug-fix'."
    },
    "importance": {
      "type": "number",
      "minimum": 0,
      "maximum": 1,
      "default": 0.5,
      "description": "0.0 = transient, 1.0 = critical. High importance memories are promoted to Episodic Memory during consolidation."
    },
    "source": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": ["user", "tool", "observation", "inference"],
      "default": "user",
      "description": "Origin of the information."
    }
  }
}
}

9:["$","$L7",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"recall\",\n\"description\": \"Retrieve relevant memories from long-term storage. Use when you need context about past interactions, user preferences, or established facts.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"required\": [\"query\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"query\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"Natural language description of what you're looking for.\"\n    },\n    \"top_k\": {\n      \"type\": \"integer\",\n      \"minimum\": 1,\n      \"maximum\": 50,\n      \"default\": 5,\n      \"description\": \"Maximum number of memories to retrieve.\"\n    },\n    \"tags\": {\n      \"type\": \"array\",\n      \"items\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n      \"description\": \"Filter to memories with these tags.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
a:["$","h2",null,{"children":"add_fact"}]
b:["$","$L7",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"add_fact\",\n\"description\": \"Store a structured fact as a subject-predicate-object triple. Use for precise, relational knowledge that benefits from graph queries.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"required\": [\"subject\", \"predicate\", \"object\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"subject\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The entity the fact is about.\"\n    },\n    \"predicate\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The relationship or property. Use consistent predicates for the same concept.\"\n    },\n    \"object\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The value or target entity.\"\n    },\n    \"confidence\": {\n      \"type\": \"number\",\n      \"minimum\": 0,\n      \"maximum\": 1,\n      \"default\": 1.0,\n      \"description\": \"Certainty level. Lower confidence facts may be overridden by higher confidence ones.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
c:["$","h2",null,{"children":"query_facts"}]
d:["$","$L7",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"query_facts\",\n\"description\": \"Query the temporal knowledge graph for structured facts. Use for precise lookups and relationship traversal.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"subject\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"Filter by subject entity.\"\n    },\n    \"predicate\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"Filter by relationship type.\"\n    },\n    \"object\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"Filter by target value.\"\n    },\n    \"current_only\": {\n      \"type\": \"boolean\",\n      \"default\": true,\n      \"description\": \"Only return facts that haven't been superseded.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
e:["$","h2",null,{"children":"forget"}]

Use when information is outdated, incorrect, or explicitly requested to be removed.\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"type\": \"object\",\n  \"required\": [\"id\"],\n  \"properties\": {\n    \"id\": {\n      \"type\": \"string\",\n      \"description\": \"The memory ID to delete.\"\n    }\n  }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]
